Weekly IPO Tracker Report

SpaceX IPO Week of 2026-04-16

Welcome to this week's SpaceX IPO Insider report. Below are the latest developments in SpaceX's journey toward going public.

📰 Top Headlines

SpaceX IPO: History Says the Stock Will Do This When It Starts Trading. | The Motley Fool

Reuters has reported that the rocket ... has reported a $5 billion loss on about $18 billion in revenue. SpaceX will host its IPO roadshow in early June, where executives will pitch the stock to institutional investo...

Read more →

How the math works on a $1.75 trillion SpaceX valuation | Reuters

Elon Musk’s SpaceX is seeking a $1.75 trillion valuation in its forthcoming initial public offering. How far into the stratosphere is that?

Read more →

FinancialContent - The $100 Billion Gravity Well: How SpaceX’s Imminent IPO Could Reshape Alphabet’s Future

Internal sources and confidential SEC filings suggest that SpaceX, the aerospace behemoth founded by Elon Musk, is preparing to go public as early as June 2026 with a staggering target valuation of nearly $2 trillion.

Read more →

SpaceX Gears Up for Mega-IPO With Facility Visits for Anchor Investors - Bloomberg

SpaceX is gearing up to take potential anchor investors in its IPO on a tour of its marquee sites across America, people familiar with the plans said, as billionaire Elon Musk’s company targets the biggest ever market debut.

Read more →

Starfighters Space Partners with Blackstar Orbital for Hypersonic Testing Platform as Space Sector Prepares for Historic SpaceX Public Debut

SpaceX's April 1, 2026 confidential IPO filing has fundamentally altered the space investment landscape. With reports of seeking up to $75 billion in capital at valuations approaching $1.75 trillion, the offering would eclipse all previous public ...

Read more →

Current Valuation

~$350B

Based on latest secondary market transactions and investor rounds.

Key Angle

SpaceX valuation growth signals investor confidence ahead of IPO

IPO Timeline

SpaceX is expected to go public in Q4 2026. Starlink IPO expected to precede SpaceX by 6-12 months. SEC filing anticipated Q2-Q3 2026.
